subject: biology
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.25
question_html:
Which structures are part of the walls of both capillaries and veins?

I. Cells

II. Pores

III. Elastic fibres

A. I only

B. I and II

C. I and III

D. I, II and III
examiners_html: This was another question where fewer candidates answered correctly than the guess-level of 25%. The most popular choice had elastic fibres as a feature of both capillaries and veins. This indicates that many candidates' knowledge of the structure of blood vessels was weak.
